title: American Passengers On Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship To Quarantine In Nebraska: Report
summary_full: Washington, May 9 (IANS) American passengers aboard the cruise ship at the centre of a hantavirus outbreak will be quarantined in Nebraska upon arrival in the United States, local media reported, citing an official from the US Centres for Disease Con
